original: \nA shockwave of concussive energy bursts across "+o.getCombatName()+"!
\nA shockwave of concussive energy bursts across "+o.getCombatName()+"!
It lunges into battle, but it can’t find purchase on "+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"your foe":"you")+"!
It lunges towards "+t.getCombatName()+", shrieking like a banshee. Its fangs sink into your enemy, rending viciously at "+t.getCombatPronoun("himher")+"!
Shrieking like a banshee, it lunges towards you and its fangs sink in, rending at you viciously!
A resounding ‘CLANG’ fills the air. "+n.mf("He","She’s")+" packing a little extra metal in "+n.mf("his","her")+" noggin. You’ll have to try something else!

\nAt first it seems impossible, but your sheer brawn overpowers the killer laquine. There’s a tremble in her eyes that excites you, and then she pulls herself away, legs unbalanced. You stunned her... somehow!
\nIt doesn’t look to have stunned your foe!
\nBut, inside her, there’s only the hunt and the need to hurt. She lurches back and thrusts you away, not much worse for the wear.
You are staggered by the hail of fire!
"+_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(n.isPlural?"are":"is")+" staggered by the hail of fire!
\nSpraying and praying will have reduced effectiveness while she’s alert and aware!

"+_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(n.isPlural?"are":"is")+" staggered by the hail of fire!
\n\nYou dive out of the way of the gravity-empowered strike.
\n\n"+_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatName(),!1)+" dives away from your gravity-empowered strike.
The attack strikes true, plowing into "+n.getCombatName()+" with excessive force.
\n\nWith an almost preternatural sense of self-preservation,

shaking, and looking hardly worse for wear!

confused "+(e.length>1?"rats stand, idly groping themselves":"rat stands, idly groping "+o.constructor.getLeaderRat(!1).mf("himself","herself"))+". “You... W-what the h-hell is this? Did you get tha... thaaaa-TT from one of the Vipers?!” comes a lewd cry, the lust obvious in their unsteady speech.
Already defeated, the detonation on ".concat(n.getCombatName()," was of no use!")
Due to your extra milky ability, an unexpected burst of fluid fills your gullet and almost makes you choke on your drink!
\n\nYou feel revitalized, but you better end this fight before your [pc.milkNoun]’s aphrodisiacs kick in...
\nHowever "+n.getCombatName()+" absorbs the electricity and it seems to strengthen it. "+_.m.printStatChange("S",25,"shieldHeal","shield")
You shudder and stop, temporarily paralyzed!
The flames surge, licking at your target’s compatriots!
The disruption spreads to encompass a small, localized area neatly surrounding your enemies!
\nThe lingering gravitic field will reduce all kinetic damage!
\nHowever "+n.getCombatName()+" absorbs the electrical surge and it seems to strengthen it. "+_.m.printStatChange("S",25,"shieldHeal","shield")
There is a concussive boom and tingling aftershock of energy as "+_.m.possessive(n.getCombatName())+" shields are breached.
There is a concussive boom and a tingling aftershock of energy as "+_.m.possessive(n.getCombatName())+" shield is breached.
\nArcs of lightning chain out to strike "+o[s].getCombatName()+"!
\n"+_.m.capitalize(r.getCombatName(),!1)+" manage"+(r.isPlural?"":"s")+" to keep away from the blinding particles.
\nYour goggles cover your eyes from the blinding projectile and you avoid being blinded.",null,t

\n“Grrrraaaaaah!!!” peals the rabbit, who even now swipes her arms at eddying hallucinations. She stomp-charges in your direction, entering into a mad berserk state. Being robbed of her senses has only triggered a grizzly frenzy that could scare a mythical dragon away".concat(t.isStunned()||t.isStaggered()?", so enraged that she’s overcome her stunned delirium":"","."),null,t
The big Jumper guards herself well from your blinding trick. Long, floppy ears ‘whap’ as she shakes the blear from her head. “Kfff... grrhh!” Better try something else...! ",null,t
\nYou manage to avoid the blinding projectile.",null,t
\n".concat(_.m.capitalize(compressToList(i),!1)," are blinded by the luminous flashes.")

\n".concat(_.m.capitalize(r[0],!1)," manage").concat(u?"":"s"," to avoid the blinding projectile.")
\n\n"+_.m.capitalize(_.m.possessive(a.getCombatName()),!1)+" blind strike"+(a.isPlural?"s fail":" fails")+" to connect.
\n\n"+_.m.capitalize(a.getCombatName(),!1)+" misses the low blow "+a.getCombatPronoun("heshe")+" aimed at "+n.getCombatName()+".

FWHUMP!\n\n...Nothing. Something solid blocked your dirty move. An evil grin gleams in your upper periphery, and an incoming attack forces you away. Scanning the Jumper reveals that your low blow failed. Whatever material her suit is made out of nullifies physical trauma. Fighting like this won’t help!
\nIt had little effect on your automated foe!
“NNNNGhhhh!! ...kehh...!” "+(a.isErect()?"If you aren’t fighting dirty, you don’t want to win. ":"")+"Without her special armor to protect her, she’s recoiling in sincere agony. She is stunned.
It doesn’t look like you accomplished much more than hitting your target.
\nYou manage to shrug off the potentially debilitating hit.
\nThough you aren’t stunned, your the sheer damage you’re taking adds up.
\nThough "+n.getCombatName()+" "+(n.isPlural?"aren’t":"isn’t")+" stunned, all the damage is adding up...

\n\n"+_.m.possessive(n.getCombatName())+" eyes cross from the overwhelming pain. She sways back and forth like a drunken sailor before hitting the floor with all the grace of a felled tree. A high pitched squeak of pain rolls out of her plump lips. She’s very, very stunned.
and snap into place, wrapping you up. You are stunned!
and snap into place. "+_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatName(),!1)+" is stunned!
, but "+n.getCombatName()+" struggle"+(n.isPlural?"":"s")+" out before they can snap into place.
, but you struggle out before they can restrain you.
, but "+n.getCombatName()+" struggle"+(n.isPlural?"":"s")+" out before they can snap into place.
“"+RandomInCollection(["Buh-byees!","Sorry about this!","Pew!","Later alligator!","Kissing woulda been more fun!","Bingo!"])+"”

\n\n"+textify(E||(E=(0,T.Z)(["When [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the laquine] swings, you fling out your mag binders, their inner circuitries coming to life. The Jumper sees them coming a mile away, however, flicking each band aside with accurate kicks and punches. Damnit."])))
You let fly, but the "+(a.isBlind()?"blind-fired ":"")+"arrow sails clean past your intended target"+(n.isPlural?"s":"")+".
You let fly, and a moment later, the arrow explodes in a shockwave of force
though "+n.getCombatName()+" resist"+(n.isPlural?"":"s")+" the blast. Your stun-shot failed!
\n\n“Do you feel me?” you ask softly, gazing at "+i.getCombatName()+" with half-lidded eyes. “You will soon.”",null,a
The shots blat off ".concat(n.getCombatName(),"’s shield, doing all the damage of raindrops on an umbrella.")
The shots thump into the target, dissolving into them.
It doesn’t seem to have any effect, though.

".concat(_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatPronoun("s"))," shudders, ").concat(n.getCombatPronoun("pa")," lips parting and ").concat(n.getCombatPronoun("pa")," gaze seeming to cloud. ").concat(_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatName())," is stupefied!")
You get your angles wrong however, and the grenade agonizingly whistles past your foe, detonating with a vicious but harmless clap beyond them.
It bounces with a clack right next to them and detonates with a violent gasp of air, rocking them to their core.
All the hair on your body immediately stands on end as the air becomes charged with electricity.

Slivers of electricity spark up the side of ".concat(a.isRobot()?"the thing’s hull, its":"".concat(a.getCombatPronoun("hisher")," side, ").concat(a.getCombatPronoun("hisher"))," systems desperately attempting to cope with the huge surge of current you’ve just forced into it. The smell of melting plastic hangs in the air.")
It didn’t seem to do any damage to the ".concat(a.getCombatName()," – but they look distinctly drained and shell-shocked now.")
The hit was hard enough to stun you!
In your flight, "+n.getCombatPronoun("heshe")+" "+(s?"are":"is")+" able to swiftly dart away from the misguided attempt.
Being firmly planted to the ground makes the attempt to trip "+n.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" essentially useless.
Sadly, that target is immune to such tricks.
_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatPronoun("heshe"))+" neatly hop"+(s?"":"s")+" over the misguided attempt.

_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatPronoun("heshe"))+" go"+(s?"":"es")+" down to the ground! "+_.m.capitalize(n.getCombatPronoun("heshe"))+"’"+(s?"re":"s")+" going to have a difficult time fighting from down here!

\n\nLassitude sprawls out into "+a.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" muscles like leaden weights. "+_.m.capitalize(a.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(i?"are":"is")+" weakened and slowed as "+o.getCombatName()+" gain"+(o.isPlural?"":"s")+" evasion!
\nThe needles break apart uselessly on contact with your defenses.
\nYou manage to avoid most of the projectiles, but one still impacts your arm, stinging you with a pinprick of pain. You yank it out, but its payload is already spent, injected inside you.
\nTwo needles slam into your body, imparting bursts of searing pain when they penetrate your flesh. You yank them out in irritation, but whatever they contained is inside you now.
\nAll three needles hit you before you can react.
You find yourself wondering what it would be like to slip into her puffy, double-clitted box.",null,a

ou idly consider throwing the fight for a quick fuck.

\nThe spike stops growing long before it hits "+a.getCombatName()+". Flying has its advantages!

\nSomehow, "+a.getCombatName()+" fights against the press, holding "+a.getCombatPronoun("himher")+"self against the press with bodily greatness.
